description: Workflow category taxonomy. Workflows chain atomic skills into multi-step processes. Categories organize workflows by domain and intent. Existing workflows may also use skill categories (software-development, writing, business, etc.) for backwards compatibility -- see _schema.json for the full enum.

software-project.label: Software Project Workflows
software-project.description: End-to-end software project workflows covering architecture, development, deployment, and operations.
software-project.includes: SaaS launches, REST API builds, dev environment setup, production deployments, incident response pipelines
software-project.excludes: Individual coding skills (-> software-development skills), DevOps tool configuration (-> skills), mobile-only apps without web backend

content-creation.label: Content Creation Workflows
content-creation.description: Multi-step content production workflows from ideation through publication and distribution.
content-creation.includes: Blog post publishing pipelines, book chapter writing, content calendar creation, newsletter launch sequences
content-creation.excludes: Single-skill writing tasks (-> writing skills), marketing strategy (-> business-operations), social media posting (-> skills)

business-operations.label: Business Operations Workflows
business-operations.description: Business process workflows for product launches, hiring, marketing campaigns, and fundraising.
business-operations.includes: Product launches, employee hiring pipelines, marketing campaign creation, fundraising preparation
business-operations.excludes: Individual business analysis skills (-> business skills), financial modeling (-> personal-finance skills), legal entity formation (-> legal-civic skills)

life-event.label: Life Event Workflows
life-event.description: Comprehensive workflows for major life milestones requiring coordination across multiple domains.
life-event.includes: Home buying, wedding planning, baby preparation, city relocation, retirement planning
life-event.excludes: Individual financial planning skills (-> personal-finance skills), household maintenance (-> home-household skills), family relationship skills (-> family-relationships skills)

career.label: Career Workflows
career.description: End-to-end career transition and advancement workflows from preparation through execution.
career.includes: Job search pipelines, raise negotiation processes, career switching, freelancing launch, personal brand building
career.excludes: Individual resume or interview skills (-> career-development skills), salary research (-> skills), networking events (-> skills)

creative-project.label: Creative Project Workflows
creative-project.description: Multi-phase creative production workflows from concept through delivery.
creative-project.includes: Podcast episode production, online course creation, art portfolio launches, screenplay writing pipelines
creative-project.excludes: Individual design skills (-> design-creative skills), single writing tasks (-> writing skills), hobby crafts (-> hobbies-crafts skills)

cross-domain.label: Cross-Domain Workflows
cross-domain.description: Workflows that span multiple life domains requiring skills from 3+ categories.
cross-domain.includes: Side business launches, gap year planning, house renovations, community event organization
cross-domain.excludes: Single-domain projects (-> domain-specific workflow category), individual skills (-> skill categories)
